source: Combination: HD+ ion-trap (Patra et al. 2020, Science 369, 1238) + H2 absorbers at z~2-3 (Ubachs/Bagdonaite review)
notes: Best laboratory bound on μ̇/μ from HD+ Doppler-free spectroscopy is at the ~5e-17/yr level. Cosmological bounds from H2 Lyman-Werner absorbers in quasar spectra constrain |Δμ/μ| < ~1e-6 at z~2-3 at 2σ. Both bounds are model-independent and consistent with no variation.
